name: Builder
description: Simple chat-native variant builder that replaces the old Artifact Builder.
author: contex

chatSurfaces.label: Builder
chatSurfaces.description: Prompt input plus 1, 2, or 3 generated variants in chat.

actions.name: generate
actions.description: Generate builder variants from a prompt. Params: { prompt: string, variantCount?: 1|2|3 }

actions.name: setHtml
actions.description: Set the current builder HTML directly. Params: { html: string }

actions.name: setPrompt
actions.description: Set the current builder prompt without generating. Params: { prompt: string }

actions.name: addVisualReference
actions.description: Attach a screenshot or sketch reference. Params: { dataUrl: string, label?: string, mime?: string, source?: string, note?: string }

actions.name: clearVisualReferences
actions.description: Remove imported screenshot/sketch references from Builder.

actions.name: buildVisualVerificationPrompt
actions.description: Create a screenshot/QA-aware visual verification prompt. Params: { mode?: 'match-screenshot'|'visual-verify'|'qa-fix' }

actions.name: setSettings
actions.description: Update builder API settings. Params: { model?: string, baseUrl?: string, apiKey?: string }
